description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, finished in a deep, glossy red wood tone. The body features two metallic humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and two control knobs, likely for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is straight and slender, leading to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, typical of many classic electric guitar designs. The back of the guitar reveals a dark, polished wood grain with a rear electronics cavity cover. The bridge and tailpiece hardware are metallic, complementing the overall aesthetic. The instrument exudes a classic, high-quality appearance suitable for both performance and display in urban environments.
description: A glossy red, single-cutaway electric guitar with metallic hardware and dual humbucker pickups. It features a polished wood finish and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy red body, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, and the full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the polished wood grain, electronics cavity cover, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the thickness of the body and the placement of the bridge and controls.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic 3+3 tuning peg layout, no visible logo, standard contoured shape
